Retail & MSMEs

Stop typing manually. Our M-Pesa C2B integration automatically logs sales and builds your Customer CRM instantly while you sleep.

A beautiful PMS that finally maps correctly. Route Bar, Spa, and Restaurant charges natively into a single Guest Master Folio.

  • ✓ Daily Department Yield KPIs
